title: Tokenizer Encode/Decode Flow
interaction_flow: Caller → load_cosmos_1_tokenizer(checkpoint_path, load_encoder, load_decoder, load_jit, return_tokenizer_config)
load_cosmos_1_tokenizer → get_tokenizer_config(checkpoint_path): parses model name from path suffix e.g. 'Cosmos-Tokenize1-CV8x8x8-720p' → 'CV8x8x8_720p'
CausalVideoTokenizer.__init__ → load_encoder_model(checkpoint_enc, ...) / load_decoder_model(checkpoint_dec, ...): loads JIT models, casts to bfloat16
load_cosmos_1_tokenizer → Caller: returns tokenizer [and optionally tokenizer_config]
encode_video → get_encoder_chunk_size(video): determines batch chunk size based on T and H (e.g. T=49,H=480 → chunk=4)
encode_video → [loop over chunks] encode_video_model(vae, video_batch, vae_backbone)
CausalVideoTokenizer.encode → self._enc_model(input_tensor): JIT encoder model forward
CausalVideoTokenizer.encode → Caller: returns latent tuple; [0] = latent [B,16,t,h,w] (CV) or indices+code (DV)
encode_multi_view_video → [if views>1] rearrange 'b (v t) c h w -> (b v) t c h w'
encode_multi_view_video → [if views>1] rearrange '(b v) t c h w -> b (v t) c h w'
encode_multi_view_video → Caller: returns model_input [B, V*T, C, H, W]
decode_multi_view_latents → [if views>1] rearrange 'b (v t) c h w -> (b v) t c h w'
decode_multi_view_latents → get_encoder_chunk_size(latents, encoder=False): determine chunk size
decode_cosmos1 → rearrange 'b t c h w -> b c t h w': reorder latent
CausalVideoTokenizer.decode → self._dec_model(input_latent): JIT decoder model forward
CausalVideoTokenizer.decode → Caller: returns reconstructed tensor [B,3,T,H,W] range [-1,1]
decode_multi_view_latents → [if views>1] rearrange '(b v) c t h w -> b c (v t) h w'
decode_multi_view_latents → Caller: returns pixel video [B,T,C,H,W] clipped [-1,1]
TokenizerModel._network_forward → self._on_before_network_forward(data_batch): optionally shuffle frames for consistency loss
TokenizerModel._network_forward → self.network(tensor_batch): forward through CausalContinuousVideoTokenizer (encode + decode)
TokenizerModel.training_step → self.loss(inputs, output_dict, iteration): compute losses
key_relationships: load_cosmos_1_tokenizer depends_on CausalVideoTokenizer (JIT path) or TokenizerModels enum (non-JIT path)
load_cosmos_1_tokenizer depends_on TokenizerConfigs enum (config lookup by model name)
TokenizerModel composes network (CausalContinuousVideoTokenizer), loss, metric, EMAModelTracker
TokenizerModel._network_forward calls self.network (full encode+decode forward pass)
TokenizerModels enum maps: CV → CausalContinuousVideoTokenizer, DV → CausalDiscreteVideoTokenizer, CI → ContinuousImageTokenizer, DI → DiscreteImageTokenizer
load_cosmos_decoder (wrapper) calls load_cosmos_1_tokenizer with load_encoder=False, load_decoder=True, returns tokenizer_cosmos.decoder

data_shapes.latent_CV: [B, 16, t, h, w] — compression CV8x8x8: T/8 x H/8 x W/8
data_shapes.latent_CV4: [B, 16, t, h, w] — compression CV4x8x8: T/4 x H/8 x W/8

important_notes: Two paths in load_cosmos_1_tokenizer: load_jit=True uses CausalVideoTokenizer with .jit files (inference); load_jit=False uses TokenizerModels enum to instantiate full PyTorch model (training)
encode_video applies chunking to avoid OOM: chunk sizes keyed by (T, H) — e.g. T=49,H=480 → chunk=4
decode_multi_view_latents also uses chunking via get_encoder_chunk_size
Multi-view handling: views dimension is folded into batch dimension before encode/decode, then unfolded after
TokenizerModel._on_before_network_forward optionally shuffles video frames for temporal consistency loss training
CausalVideoTokenizer.encode is decorated @torch.no_grad(); encode_video also wraps in torch.no_grad()
denormalize_latents: applies sigma_data=0.5 scaling + per-channel mean/std from mean_std.pt; transposes from (B,T,C,H,W) to (B,C,T,H,W) cosmos-predict format
Supported tokenizer variants: CV8x8x8-720p, CV4x8x8-360p, DV8x16x16-720p, DV4x8x8-360p, CI8x8-360p, CI16x16-360p, DI8x8-360p, DI16x16-360p
